evals.name: basic_solution_breakdown
evals.description: Tests if the skill can break down a solution spec into a Master PRD with correct structure and slicing strategy.
evals.prompt: Break down the attached solution spec into PRDs.

inputs.solution_spec.md:
# Solution Specification: Food Delivery Platform

## 1. Why
To provide a seamless food ordering and delivery experience.

## 2. What
A platform connecting hungry users, local restaurants, and delivery drivers.

## 3. Scope (MVP)
- User App: Browsing, ordering, payment.
- Merchant Portal: Menu management, order acceptance.
- Driver App: Order matching, delivery routing.
